headline: Healthcare REITs and Storage Units Prop Up REZ While Residential Faces Headwinds
summary: The iShares Residential and Multisector Real Estate ETF (NYSEARCA:REZ) targets income investors seeking exposure to apartments, healthcare facilities, and self-storage properties in a single ticker. One correction: REZ pays quarterly, not monthly. The most recent declaration was a $0.5188 per share distribution announced March 18, 2026, and the question this article answers is whether REZ ...
